name: Shailene Woodley, Our Revolution
subject: People power, not fossil fuels
body:
Our Revolution Hawai'i organized two hundred and fifty activists at the State Capitol to move all of O'ahu to renewable energy by 2030
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a669/bed43eb/8076d45a/75fbbf16/3768655554/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR")
Friends,
Recent polls show that 73 percent of Americans accept that global warming is happening, outnumbering those who don't by five to one.
We have the majority of Americans on our side. Now, we need to mobilize these people and push like never before for bold policies like a Green New Deal.
Our goal at Our Revolution is to organize grassroots groups who work on issues, candidates, and party-building that put the interests of people and the planet first, not those of corporations and the one percent.
But in order to do that, we need power. We know that power comes from the people -- our unity, our commitment, our knowledge -- and from our strength in numbers.
[**Chip in $5 to support Our Revolution 's grassroots organizing efforts to fight for equality and climate justice.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a669/bed43eb/8076d45a/75fbbf11/3768655554/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/act-on-climate?refcode=em190122-a&noskip=true")
The scientific community is clear: the great crisis facing our planet and facing humanity is climate change. That is why building local power must be the first thought in each of our minds. It is up to us to stand up and demand a healthy, just, and sustainable planet.
Local groups like Our Revolution Hawai'i organized two hundred and fifty activists at the State Capitol to move all of O'ahu to renewable energy by 2030, but we need to take bold action like this in every single state.
**[Chip in $5 to support local groups like Our Revolution Hawai'i that are fighting for a country that puts people and our planet before profits.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a669/bed43eb/8076d45a/75fbbf11/3768655554/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/act-on-climate?refcode=em190122-a&noskip=true")**
The issue of climate change and environmental justice can no longer be ignored. Thank you for being a part of the millions of people around the world who are standing up.
In solidarity,
Shailene Woodley
Board Member
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a669/bed43eb/8076d45a/75fbbf11/3768655554/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/act-on-climate?refcode=em190122-a&noskip=true")**

Peter,

If our kickoff is any indication, this is going to be a great campaign. On a cold Sunday in January, 22 months before the election, 125 people joined our campaign team to launch Siegel for Congress 2020. A great time was had by all! We immediately received positive coverage from the [Austin-American Statesman](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4393293/35148818/-906136500?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjFjZTY2Zi0xNDFmLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=veHBtWeT8Do36HLPeHBzsctAHwFy4iN1gs1IsFfA-NQ=), which highlighted our surprising success in 2018 and our commitment to healthcare, jobs creation, and criminal justice reform. The Statesman also highlighted our commitment to deep organizing: **_“I believe that to win this race, it really requires a year-round commitment,” Siegel said. “We can’t just show up in communities on the eve of the election and make the case that the Democratic Party is going to improve their lives; rather, we need to show it year-round.”_** As part of our commitment to "Appreciation & Action," we honored over a dozen organizations for their work as "TX-10 Heroes" in 2018. And dozens of volunteers signed up for our two initial programs in 2019: registering voters across the district and mobilizing support for the Democratic agenda in the Texas Legislature. Thank you for everyone who showed up, and to all of you sending your support! Working for you,
Mike

name: Tulsi Gabbard
subject: Welcome to Team Tulsi!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TULSI FOR HAWAIʻI
body:
#
Friend - Growing up in Hawaii, I learned from a young age the importance of serving others. My life has and continues to be inspired and motivated by the spirit of aloha - the spirit of respect, love, and selfless service - as I try my best to be of service to others. We need the spirit of aloha in Congress now more than ever. There are important issues that require serious debate and meaningful action. But real action in the best interest of the people is too often neglected by the culture of self-centeredness, greed, and corruption that exists in Washington. We must change this. Congress' disapproval rating has never been higher because the system in Washington allows corporate interests to have more influence in Congress than average Americans who are struggling. I'm grateful and inspired to have you join me on our re-election campaign. But our mission is much bigger than this single election. Our real quest is to bring the aloha spirit to Washington. Together, we can end the counterproductive war to overthrow the Syrian government, expand Social Security, repair our broken political system, rebuild our aging infrastructure, and ensure the Democratic Party stands with the people, not powerful special interests. It's about time that the voice of the people is heard throughout Washington. Thanks again for your continued support and friendship. Aloha, Tulsi P.S. Please consider taking the next step to get involved in our campaign: **[JOIN US ON TWITTER](http://aloha.votetulsi.com/page/m/5df27402/176dfdf5/1222ed8c/3ce06aff/475551239/VEsH/ "https://twitter.com/TulsiGabbard")** **[JOIN US ON FACEBOOK](http://aloha.votetulsi.com/page/m/5df27402/176dfdf5/1222ed8c/3ce06afe/475551239/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/VoteTulsi/")** **[CONTRIBUTE](http://aloha.votetulsi.com/page/m/5df27402/176dfdf5/1222ed8c/3ce06af9/475551239/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/tulsi-intro-email")**
---

PAID FOR BY TULSI FOR HAWAIʻI

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, [click here to update your info](http://aloha.votetulsi.com/page/m/5df27402/176dfdf5/1222ed8c/3ce06af8/475551239/VEsC/ "http://aloha.votetulsi.com/page/s/update-your-information"). The truth is that email is one of the most important tools we have to update supporters like you. It is one way we come together as a community of progressives to make change in this world. If you would like to receive less email, you can [click right here](http://aloha.votetulsi.com/page/m/5df27402/176dfdf5/1222ed8c/3ce06afb/475551239/VEsD/ "http://aloha.votetulsi.com/page/s/receive-less-frequent-emails"). Should you want to unsubscribe--and we would hate to see you leave--[go here](http://aloha.votetulsi.com/page/m/5df27402/176dfdf5/1222ed8c/3ce06afa/475551239/VEsA/ "http://aloha.votetulsi.com/unsubscribe"). Finally, if you believe we need to end the culture of corruption and greed in Washington, [then now is the time to make a contribution to Tulsi's campaign here](http://aloha.votetulsi.com/page/m/5df27402/176dfdf5/1222ed8c/3ce06ae5/475551239/VEsB/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/tulsi-footer"). clean_body: Friend - Growing up in Hawaii, I learned from a young age the importance of serving others. My life has and continues to be inspired and motivated by the spirit of aloha - the spirit of respect, love, and selfless service - as I try my best to be of service to others. We need the spirit of aloha in Congress now more than ever. There are important issues that require serious debate and meaningful action. But real action in the best interest of the people is too often neglected by the culture of self-centeredness, greed, and corruption that exists in Washington. We must change this. Congress' disapproval rating has never been higher because the system in Washington allows corporate interests to have more influence in Congress than average Americans who are struggling. I'm grateful and inspired to have you join me on our re-election campaign. But our mission is much bigger than this single election. Our real quest is to bring the aloha spirit to Washington. Together, we can end the counterproductive war to overthrow the Syrian government, expand Social Security, repair our broken political system, rebuild our aging infrastructure, and ensure the Democratic Party stands with the people, not powerful special interests. It's about time that the voice of the people is heard throughout Washington. Thanks again for your continued support and friendship. Aloha, Tulsi P.S. Please consider taking the next step to get involved in our campaign: "" "" "" PAID FOR BY TULSI FOR HAWAIʻI

Hi Peter,
I wanted to get in touch with you today to discuss something that affects hundreds of thousands of Americans: the high cost of prescription medications.
As a legislator, I pride myself on working across party lines to deliver commonsense solutions to the problems facing working families — which is why I’m so proud of a bill I helped introduce that would require the government to negotiate with drug manufacturers for lower prices.
I want to hear from you: Do you support this bill that would lower drug prices for working Americans?

That's right, team, dark money in politics is still a growing problem -- ever since the disastrous _Citizens United_ Supreme Court decision allowed mega-donors to funnel unlimited, untraceable money into our elections.

Tom knows this trend needs to end, and he will continue to be a strong voice in Congress for more a more transparent and honest election system.

**And ending the influence of dark money is a major step forward.**

That's why he's supporting the new Congress' measure to curb dark money, strengthen disclosure law for political ads, and ensure the FEC has the capacity to keep elections fair and transparent.

**But this movement needs support from people like you, friends, to continue to demand robust reforms to our election system. ****[Click here and join Tom, and thousands of others to call for clean, transparent elections.](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633c7f/1a8421e1/19bdb967a/5f38aa04/2570959339/VEsF/ "http://sign.actiontaker.org/CU-anniversary-2019-OHalleran")**

Thank you,

Team O'Halleran

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Building this movement, together.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
body:
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976961/2ae112ef/1604f0ee/357a1323/2029428353/VEsH/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
Peter, thanks for taking the first step to join this team and help build this movement. I'm getting ready to run for president because I believe in right versus wrong, and wrong wins when we stay on the sidelines. But I can't do it alone.
Inspired by the past and hopeful for the future, I want to run a different kind of campaign. It'll be a community-led, grassroots effort. We'll accept nothing less than real reform in the way we provide health care, educate our kids and ensure good jobs. We'll take on money in politics. This effort will be driven by the hopes and dreams of hardworking people coming together to help others.
As we launch this campaign together, I wanted to make sure you could get updates, share ideas and help shape it. Here are three ways to help:
**[Sign up for texts.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/s/2020-sms?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&source=2020-welcome1")** We'll send you messages letting you know about opportunities to help and events in your area. This is one of the best ways for you to get updates on how to build this movement right in your community.
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976961/2ae112ef/1604f0ee/357a132d/2029428353/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/KirstenGillibrand/")** , **[Twitter](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976961/2ae112ef/1604f0ee/357a132c/2029428353/VEsC/ "https://twitter.com/SenGillibrand")** and **[Instagram](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976961/2ae112ef/1604f0ee/357a132f/2029428353/VEsD/ "https://www.instagram.com/kirstengillibrand/")**. I'll post stories and videos as we travel across the country meeting people and share a vision of what and who we're fighting for. I'd love to connect with you and for you to be a part of our conversation!
**[Donate](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976961/2ae112ef/1604f0ee/357a132e/2029428353/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMjAtd2VsY29tZTEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=2020-welcome1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**. We're building this movement without accepting contributions from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. We're building it together, and when you give $5, $10 or $25, you help us reach more people and share our vision for the future with them.
I am ready to run, to fight for change, and it lifts me up to know you're in.
There's so much more coming soon. Thank you for being part of this.
Kirsten Gillibrand

clean_body: "" Peter, thanks for taking the first step to join this team and help build this movement. I'm getting ready to run for president because I believe in right versus wrong, and wrong wins when we stay on the sidelines. But I can't do it alone. Inspired by the past and hopeful for the future, I want to run a different kind of campaign. It'll be a community-led, grassroots effort. We'll accept nothing less than real reform in the way we provide health care, educate our kids and ensure good jobs. We'll take on money in politics. This effort will be driven by the hopes and dreams of hardworking people coming together to help others. As we launch this campaign together, I wanted to make sure you could get updates, share ideas and help shape it. Here are three ways to help: "" We'll send you messages letting you know about opportunities to help and events in your area. This is one of the best ways for you to get updates on how to build this movement right in your community. Follow us on "" , "" and "". I'll post stories and videos as we travel across the country meeting people and share a vision of what and who we're fighting for. I'd love to connect with you and for you to be a part of our conversation! "". We're building this movement without accepting contributions from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. We're building it together, and when you give $5, $10 or $25, you help us reach more people and share our vision for the future with them. I am ready to run, to fight for change, and it lifts me up to know you're in. There's so much more coming soon. Thank you for being part of this. Kirsten Gillibrand ""

name: Steve Chabot
subject: What the heck is a “Green New Deal”?
body:
What the heck is a "Green New Deal"? No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-jy/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-y/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-j/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-t/)
### [What the heck is a "Green New Deal"?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-i/)
Well, the partial government shutdown drags on. Today is day 33 - the longest shutdown in U.S. history. We've seen Speaker Pelosi uninvite President Trump to the State of the Union. We've seen President Trump counterpunch, and cancel Pelosi's plane ride to the Middle East. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-d/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Hold on to Your Wallet](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-u/)
There are a whole bunch of Democrats who would like to be "the chosen one" to run against President Trump in the next election. Elizabeth Warren of Massachusetts, Tulsi Gabbard of Hawaii, and Julian Castro of Texas are a few who have already thrown their hats into the ring. I would expect a slew of others to jump in in the upcoming weeks and months. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-b/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-n/)
### [Is "A Wall an Immorality"?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-p/)
Last week, Nancy Pelosi, who is once again the most powerful Member of the U.S. House of Representatives, claimed that "a wall is an immorality." Is she right? In my opinion, absolutely not. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-x/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-c/)
### [My Predictions for 2019](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-q/)
Well, it's that time of year again. Time for me to go out on a limb, and predict what's going to happen in the upcoming year. Here goes. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-a/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-f/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-z/)
### [A Shutdown, Troop Withdrawals, and a Resignation](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-v/)
First of all, I hope you and your loved ones had a very blessed Christmas. As we should always remember at this time of year, there are those in uniform and otherwise serving our nation in remote areas around the globe, who cannot be with their families, and may God keep them contented and protected until they are back home with their loved ones. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-e/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-s/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-g/)
### [Another Shutdown?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtiidkhl-kujkulhluu-w/)
Is the government really going to shut down in a couple days? And if so who's to blame? And will Social Security checks still go out? And will our soldiers facing hostile forces like the Taliban in Afghanistan still get paid? And if it snows, will my street still get cleared? WHAT'S GOING TO HAPPEN?
